Comfortable Accommodations: Mwi Village House in Mto wa Mbu offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and garden, terrace, or lake views. Each room includes a work desk, dining area, and free WiFi.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace, enjoy the outdoor fireplace, and utilise the shared kitchen. Additional amenities include free on-site private parking, bicycle parking, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental or vegetarian breakfast is served daily, featuring local specialities, juice, pancakes, and fruits. The outdoor seating area provides a pleasant setting for meals.
Convenient Location: Located 8 km from Lake Manyara, the property offers easy access to local attractions.
